name: ubank
one_liner: High-interest savings account with no monthly fees and a referral cash bonus.
benefit: Competitive bonus interest rate on savings (up to ~5% p.a. when conditions met); no monthly fees; linked Spend account with no foreign transaction fees on overseas purchases.
signup_bonus: ~$20–30 for new customers who sign up via a referral (check current terms)
referral_note: Get a referral via OzBargain's referral threads/randomiser so both you and the referrer get the bonus.

how_to_join.action: Get a referral code from OzBargain's ubank referral thread
Download the ubank app and apply with the referral code
how_to_join.detail: You need a valid AU mobile number and ID (passport or driver's licence).

how_to_join.action: Open both a Save account and a Spend account
Deposit $200+/month into the Save account to qualify for bonus interest
how_to_join.detail: Check the current conditions in the app as the minimum deposit amount may change.

prerequisites: New ubank customer only (never held a ubank or 86 400 account)
risks: Bonus interest rate requires minimum monthly deposit — check current conditions in-app
Referral bonus only for new accounts; previous 86 400 customers do not qualify
Interest rates are variable and can change at any time
est_value: ~$20–30 signup bonus + competitive savings interest (~5% p.a. when conditions met)
